title: Add security headers middleware
description: X-Content-Type-Options=nosniff, X-Frame-Options=DENY, Referrer-Policy=strict-origin-when-cross-origin, Permissions-Policy minimal, optional HSTS when secure cookies enabled.

title: Add rate limit on /auth/login and /auth/register
description: Brute-force protection: in-memory token-bucket per IP+email, fail-open on errors. ~5 attempts/15min on login; ~3/hour on register.

title: Enforce ENCRYPTION_KEY in non-debug
description: Currently empty key silently falls back to storing data-source passwords as plaintext. In non-DEBUG mode, app must refuse to start with empty/invalid key.

title: Harden CORS to configured origins
description: Replace allow_origins=['*'] with configurable list from settings (CORS_ALLOW_ORIGINS env). With credentials enabled, '*' is browser-rejected; production must restrict to known origins.

title: Production-ready hardening epic
description: Make tripl production-ready: harden CORS, enforce encryption key, add rate-limit for auth, security headers, request-id/log middleware, and fix 87 ruff lint errors. Tests + mypy + tsc/eslint are already green; this epic addresses real prod gaps without refactoring giant files.

title: Fix 87 ruff lint errors
description: Run ruff --fix for 51 autofixable issues, then resolve remaining manually (UP042, SIM110, E501, I001). Keep behavior unchanged.

title: Add request-id and structured logging
description: Per-request UUID via middleware, exposed as X-Request-ID header, included in log records. Sets up basic JSON logging baseline for production.
